stemHtml: What is measured in order to establish aircraft position in relation to the localiser beam on an ILS?

options.a: The difference in depth between the 90 Hz modulation and the 150 Hz modulation.
options.b: The difference in time between the 90 Hz modulation and the 150 Hz modulation.
options.c: The difference in phase between the 90 Hz modulation and the 150 Hz modulation.
options.d: The bearing to the localiser antenna found by means of a loop antenna.
